points.title: The service reviews its privacy policy on a regular basis

case.title: The service reviews its Privacy Policy on a regular basis
case.description: Users know the date the privacy policy was last updated and can thus infer the next time it will be reviewed. This gives users more certainty about how long they can trust the current policy to apply.

points.title: This service allows you to retrieve an archive of your data

case.title: You can retrieve an archive of your data
case.description: Users can request a copy of the data collected through the services and infer from it the amount of personal information that is processed and stored by the Service. This usually applies to Services GDPR compliants.

points.title: You can choose with whom you share content

case.title: You can choose with whom you share content
case.description: Users can decide whether or not they want their content to be shared and they can control how and with whom it is shared.

points.title: Your identity is used in ads that are shown to other users

case.title: Your identity is used in ads that are shown to other users
case.description:
Ads shown to other users may include a reference to you as an implied endorsement.
Might give away information about your own personal lifestyle to strangers.

points.title: This service may keep personal data after a request for erasure for business interests or legal obligations

case.title: Some personal data may be kept for business interests or legal obligations
case.description: After the end of the data retention period and/or if you request the deletion of your data, they may still keep it for business interests (fraud detection, transactions...) or legal obligations (tax, legal reporting...)

points.title: Users agree not to submit libelous, harassing or threatening content
points.analysis: "Google reserves the right to suspend or terminate your access to the services or delete your Google Account if any of these things happen:[...] — for example, by hacking, phishing, harassing,"

case.title: You agree not to submit libelous, harassing or threatening content
case.description: This service prohibits users from submitting content of a variety of types. This can include content that is unlawful, harassing, abusive, threatening, libelous, sexist, racist, homophobic, transphobic, or discriminatory in any other way.

points.title: This service prohibits users from attempting to gain unauthorized access to other computer systems
points.analysis: "Google reserves the right to suspend or terminate your access to the services or delete your Google Account if any of these things happen:[...] — for example, by hacking, phishing,"

case.title: You are prohibited from attempting to gain unauthorized access to other computer systems
case.description: The service does not allow any attempts at hacking or otherwise gaining unauthorized access to other users' computers.

points.title: If you offer suggestions to the service, they may use that without your approval or compensation, but they do not become the owner

case.title: If you offer suggestions to the service, they may use that without your approval or compensation, but they do not become the owner
case.description: The service may employ a broad copyright license over feedback, proposals, ideas and suggestions submitted, including the right to use them without restriction, compensation or obligation to the user, but they do not claim ownership on them.

points.title: They may stop providing the service at any time

case.title: They may stop providing the service at any time
case.description: They may discontinue the services without prior notice, at any time, for any or no reason. They usually assume no liability for losses and damages resulting from this suspension.

points.title: This service does not guarantee that it or the products obtained through it meet the users' expectations or requirements

case.title: This service does not guarantee that it or the products obtained through it meet your expectations or requirements
case.description: This service provider informs its users that the services, information, products, or other materials provided on its website may not meet the users' expectations or requirements.

points.title: Users cannot scrape the website of the service
points.analysis: "Google reserves the right to suspend or terminate your access to the services or delete your Google Account if any of these things happen:[...] — for example, by hacking, phishing, harassing, spamming, misleading others, or scraping content that doesn’t belong to you"

case.title: Spidering, crawling, or accessing the site through any automated means is not allowed

points.title: There is a date of the last update of the terms

case.title: There is a date of the last update of the agreements
case.description: The given text has a date that allows to know when it was last updated.

points.title: There is a date of the last update of the agreements

case.title: There is a date of the last update of the agreements
case.description: The given text has a date that allows to know when it was last updated.

points.title: This service prohibits users sending chain letters, junk mail, spam or any unsolicited messages
points.analysis: "Google reserves the right to suspend or terminate your access to the services or delete your Google Account if any of these things happen:[...] — for example, by hacking, phishing, harassing, spamming,"

case.title: You are prohibited from sending chain letters, junk mail, spam or any unsolicited messages
case.description: Users are not allowed to use the service for chain letters, junk mail, spamming or any other distribution of content to people who have not agreed to receiving it.

points.title: The service can delete your account without prior notice and without a reason
points.analysis:
"Google reserves the right to suspend or terminate your access to the services or delete your Google Account if any of these things happen: [...] we reasonably believe that your conduct causes harm or liability to a user, third party, or Google"
Google may terminate users causing harm to Google.

case.title: Your account can be deleted or permanently suspended without prior notice and without a reason
case.description: At any time, your account can be terminated without explanation and without warning by the service.

points.title: You can opt out of targeted advertising

case.title: You can opt out of targeted advertising
case.description: The service employs your data to target ads to you, but you can opt-out of this interest-based advertising.

points.title: Third parties used by the service are bound by confidentiality obligations
points.analysis: "For external processing We provide personal information to our affiliates and other trusted businesses or persons to process it for us, based on our instructions and in compliance with our Privacy Policy and any other appropriate confidentiality and security measures."

case.title: Third parties used by the service are bound by confidentiality obligations
case.description: The Third Parties accessing your personal information must keep it confidential and only use it for limited purposes.

points.title: You have the right to leave this service at any time

case.title: You have the right to leave this service at any time
case.description: You can stop using the service and/or cancel or delete your account at any time for any reason. Moreover, the termination is reasonably fast and simple.

points.title: You can limit how your information is used by third-parties and the service

case.title: You can limit how your information is used by third parties and the service
case.description: Usually it's related to the right to object to data processing or restrict it under the GDPR. Users may be able to refuse the use of their data for marketing purposes for instance.

points.title: Your personal data is used for advertising

case.title: Your personal data is used for advertising
case.description: Your interaction with the service and data you have shared with them may be gathered to create an advertising ID or profile to target ads on you, either on the website you were visiting or in third party websites.

points.title: Information is provided about what kind of information they collect

case.title: Information is provided about what kind of personal information is collected
case.description: The Privacy Policy describes in detail the data collected through the website and through the services provided.

points.title: This service receives your precise location through GPS coordinates

case.title: This service receives your precise location through GPS coordinates
case.description: Unless the service relies on Geo Location, this case is to be assigned to points that don't need your GPS coordinates to function properly.

points.title: Information is gathered about you through third parties

case.title: Information is gathered about you through third parties
case.description: This Service may employ, either identifiable or non-identifiable, data collection from third party sources about you.

points.title: You are tracked via web beacons, tracking pixels, browser fingerprinting, and/or device fingerprinting

case.title: You are tracked via web beacons, tracking pixels, browser fingerprinting, and/or device fingerprinting
case.description: Tracking technologies (such as web beacons, tracking pixels...) are employed on users and/or the service assigns a unique ID to a browser or device to track its behaviour.

points.title: Your profile is combined across various products

case.title: Your profile is combined across various products
case.description: When using multiple services from one same company, they can combine these (unrelated) information sources about you to build up a single richer user profile about you.

points.title: You can opt out of targeted advertising

case.title: You can opt out of targeted advertising
case.description: The service employs your data to target ads to you, but you can opt-out of this interest-based advertising.

points.title: Your personal data is aggregated into statistics

case.title: Your personal data is aggregated into statistics
case.description: Your personal data is used for statistics in a de-identified/aggregated form (i.e. not directly linked to a unique identity) to analyse trends, for research and for analytics.

points.title: This service tracks you on other websites

case.title: You may be tracked on other websites
case.description: The service may use tracking technologies in third-party websites to track your online activity while you aren't visiting their Site.

points.title: You can opt out of providing personal information to third parties

case.title: You can opt out of providing personal information to third parties
case.description: The Service provides opt-out instructions to the share of (some) personal information with third parties.

points.title: The service claims to be GDPR compliant for European users

case.title: The service claims to be GDPR compliant for European users
case.description: The service has a different behavior towards users protected by the GDPR.

points.title: Many different types of personal data are collected

case.title: Many different types of personal data are collected
case.description: The service collects different kinds of personal data, such as name, demographic information, postal address, biometric data, device information, IDs, contacts, call logs...

points.title: Blocking first party cookies may limit your ability to use the service

case.title: Blocking first-party cookies may limit your ability to use the service
case.description: Most browsers allow users to set preferences related to cookies storage. You may choose to block all cookies (including first-party cookies), but it may impact your use of this service and you may not be able to access some or any of the features provided.

points.title: Voice data is collected and shared with third-parties

case.title: Voice data is collected and shared with third parties
case.description: The service collects data and recordings of your voice when you communicate with a service verbally and may use and share them with third parties, that may use this data for marketing or advertising.

points.title: Your information is only shared with third parties when given specific consent

case.title: Your information is only shared with third parties when given specific consent
case.description: The service does not share user information with any third parties unless users specifically give it permission to do so.

points.title: Promises will be kept after a merger or acquisition

case.title: Promises will be kept after a merger or acquisition
case.description: If the service gets acquired or needs to transfer personal data after a merger, bankruptcy, reorganisation or sale of the services, the data will still be processed in a manner that honours the promises made in the agreements.

points.title: Information is provided about security practices

case.title: Information is provided about security practices
case.description: It's important to know what security measures are taken to protect your data from unauthorized access. This case applies to the Agreements that precisely explain their security practices.

points.title: The service may keep a secure, anonymized record of your data for analytical purposes even after the data retention period

case.title: The service may keep a secure, anonymized record of your data for analytical purposes even after the data retention period
case.description: The data retention period states how long a service keeps user data. In this case, the service may anonymize the personal data after its retention period is over and use it for analytical or research purposes.

points.title: Your data may be processed and stored anywhere in the world

case.title: Your data may be processed and stored anywhere in the world
case.description: Your data is stored all over the world, including in countries where data protection rules may differ from the ones of the service's jurisdiction or those of your country jurisdiction.

points.title: A complaint mechanism is provided for the handling of personal data

case.title: A complaint mechanism is provided for the handling of personal data
case.description: The service provides users with contact information for an internal or external structure to lodge complaints. It also provides users with contact information for a higher data protection / privacy office in case the internal mechanism fails to satisfy the user.

points.title: This service may collect, use, and share location data

case.title: Location data may be collected, used and/or shared
case.description: Location-based information is collected and may be used and/or shared with third parties for purposes not directly related to the services provided (i.e. the Service doesn't rely on the use or share of location data to function properly).

points.title: Third parties are involved in operating the service

case.title: Third parties are involved in operating the service

points.title: Your personal data may be used for marketing purposes

case.title: Your personal data may be used for marketing purposes
case.description: The service may use your personal data for marketing, such as sending you personalised offerings.

points.title: Archives of their agreements are provided so that changes can be viewed over time

case.title: Archives of their agreements are provided so that changes can be viewed over time
case.description: This case applies to Services whose agreements provide previous versions, so that users can compare them and understand how the Service seems to evolve regarding user rights.

points.title: This service tracks which web page referred you to it

case.title: This service tracks which web page referred you to it
case.description: The service logs the URL of the last web page you visited before visiting the Site and may use that information to gather more data about you.

points.title: The service informs you that its privacy policy does not apply to third party websites

case.title: This service informs you that its Privacy Policy does not apply to third-party services
case.description: The service states that whenever it links to third party websites or applications, its privacy policy does not apply. Those third party websites or applications hosted or operated by other organizations may have their own privacy policies.

points.title: The service will only respond to government requests that are reasonable

case.title: The service will only respond to government requests that are reasonable
case.description: The Agreement explains they will disclose personal data about you if it is reasonably necessary to comply with applicable law and government requests.

points.title: Third-party cookies are used for statistics

case.title: Third-party cookies are used for statistics
case.description: For instance, Google Analytics, rather than self-hosted (first-party) statistics software.

points.title: Your biometric data is collected

case.title: Your biometric data is collected
case.description: This service can collect or use your biometric data. This includes but is not limited to facial recognition, fingerprints, and iris scans. Although this feature can sometimes be convenient to the user, providing this type of information to the service could open your personal data to being sold or stolen.

points.title: This service is only available to users over a certain age

case.title: This service is only available to users over a certain age
case.description: The Services are intended for users who are at least a certain age. If you are younger than the age required then you are prohibited from using the Service.

points.title: Your use is throttled

case.title: Your use is throttled
case.description: The service may impose limits or restrictions to the use of the service, thus negatively impacting users experience. They may do so without reason or prior notice.

points.title: You are prohibited from attempting to gain unauthorized access to other computer systems

case.title: You are prohibited from attempting to gain unauthorized access to other computer systems
case.description: The service does not allow any attempts at hacking or otherwise gaining unauthorized access to other users' computers.

points.title: Spidering, crawling, or accessing the site through any automated means is only allowed if you respect machine-readable instructions set by this service like robots.txt

case.title: Spidering, crawling, or accessing the site through any automated means is not allowed

points.title: The service has non-exclusive use of your content

case.title: The service has non-exclusive use of your content
case.description: The service can pay for your content and you are allowed to make it commercially available to other services/parties.

points.title: Your personal data may be disclosed to comply with government requests without notice to you

case.title: Your personal data may be disclosed to comply with government requests without notice to you
case.description: If the Government governing the Terms requests personal data of a user of this service, they may not inform/notify the user while complying with the request.

points.title: Instructions are provided on how to submit a copyright claim

case.title: Instructions are provided on how to submit a copyright claim
case.description: If content that you own is copied or made accessible through the service in a way that constitutes an intellectual property right infringement, you can report it following the instructions given in the agreements.

points.title: You have the right to leave this service at any time

case.title: You have the right to leave this service at any time
case.description: You can stop using the service and/or cancel or delete your account at any time for any reason. Moreover, the termination is reasonably fast and simple.

points.title: They store data on you even if you did not interact with the service

case.title: Your data is collected even if you did not interact with the service directly
case.description: Some services store data on you even if you did not provide that data yourself. For example, users might provide access to their address book, after which a service might also store the phone numbers of that person's contacts.

points.title: You can delete your content from this service

case.title: You can delete your content from this service
case.description: You can ask the service to remove your content at any time, and it's deleted within a reasonable time.

points.title: Blocking first party cookies may limit your ability to use the service

case.title: Blocking first-party cookies may limit your ability to use the service
case.description: Most browsers allow users to set preferences related to cookies storage. You may choose to block all cookies (including first-party cookies), but it may impact your use of this service and you may not be able to access some or any of the features provided.

points.title: You maintain ownership of your content

case.title: You maintain ownership of your content
case.description: This service does not claim ownership over user-generated content or materials, and the user doesn't need to waive any moral rights by posting owned content.

points.title: This service gives your personal data to third parties involved in its operation

case.title: This service gives your personal data to third parties involved in its operation
case.description: Your personal data is or may be given to third parties essential to the service’s operation. This could be an external spam detection service for an internet forum.

points.title: Your browsing history can be viewed by the service

case.title: Your browsing history can be viewed by the service
case.description: The service can view your search history and the websites you visit, which is an extremely intrusive way of collecting information that may include personal and/or sensitive data.

points.title: Your personal data is used for automated decision-making, profiling or AI training

case.title: Your personal data is used for automated decision-making, profiling or AI training
case.description: Personal data or content you share with the service may be processed to make decisions by automated means without human involvement. This includes profiling, which is any form of automated processing of your information to analyse or predict things like your economic situation, health, personal preferences or interests; as well as Artificial Intelligence training.

points.title: Your personal data is used to employ targeted third-party advertising

case.title: Your personal data is used to employ targeted third-party advertising
case.description: Your Personal Information is traded and shared with advertising companies to target ads on you, either on the website you were visiting or in third party websites. Your interaction with the service and data you have shared with them may be gathered to create an advertising ID or profile.

points.title: Many different types of personal data are collected

case.title: Many different types of personal data are collected
case.description: The service collects different kinds of personal data, such as name, demographic information, postal address, biometric data, device information, IDs, contacts, call logs...

points.title: Your private content may be accessed by people working for the service

case.title: Your private content may be accessed by people working for the service

points.title: Your IP address is collected, which can be used to view your approximate location

case.title: Your IP address is collected, which can be used to view your approximate location

points.title: You can opt out of providing personal information to third parties

case.title: You can opt out of providing personal information to third parties
case.description: The Service provides opt-out instructions to the share of (some) personal information with third parties.
